title: implment the variations for navigation from the figma design
description: implment the variations for navigation from the figma design
resolution: Implemented 5 navStyle variants from figma: classic, grouped, pill, icon-rail, accordion. Added nav-tree sample for recursive nesting. Fixed builder to read navStyle from metadata. Added section heading rendering for grouped. Added border-left for accordion children. Removed dark as a navStyle (theme concern).
